personal.name: Iakobi Iakobashvili
personal.title: Junior Full-Stack and AI developer
personal.summary: Junior developer looking for a 12-month apprenticeship. Focused on AI and full-stack development.

apprenticeship.status: Currently looking for a 12-month apprenticeship as a junior developer.
apprenticeship.availability: Available from November 2026 for an apprenticeship.
apprenticeship.goals: Looking for a company where I can use my skills and knowledge to contribute to real projects that the company needs, continue learning in a supportive team, and validate the third year of the bachelor in web, app development and AI.

education.details: Focused on full-stack and application development, AI, JavaScript, responsive design, and project-based learning.
Focused on general IT, systems and networking, programming and cybersecurity.

experience.details: Built personal web projects to improve front-end skills, UI design, and JavaScript logic.

chatbot.title: Portfolio Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! I can help you quickly learn more about Iakobi. Ask me anything about his profile, projects, skills, or apprenticeship search.
chatbot.q2: Is he looking for an apprenticeship?
chatbot.loading: My profile data is still loading. Please try again in a second.
chatbot.fallback: I do not have that exact information yet. Try asking about skills, education, projects, experience, apprenticeship, contact, GitHub, LinkedIn, or location.

projectPages.title: Portfolio Website
projectPages.subtitle: My personal portfolio project
projectPages.description: This project is my personal portfolio website. I built it to present my profile, my skills, my projects and my apprenticeship search in a clean and modern way.
projectPages.learned: Responsive design, reusable sections, project presentation, JavaScript interactions and portfolio structure.

projectPages.title: Chrome Extension - Web Browsing Analyser
projectPages.subtitle: A privacy-focused browser tool
projectPages.description: This project is a Chrome extension that helps analyze web browsing activity, cookies and trackers. It is focused on privacy awareness and browser-side analysis. The project is still under development but you can access the source code on my GitHub page.
projectPages.technologies: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Chrome Extension APIs
projectPages.learned: Extension structure, browser permissions, manifest setup, privacy-related data handling and front-end interface design.

projectPages.title: Personal Chatbot
projectPages.subtitle: Currently in progress
projectPages.description: This is a personal chatbot project designed to answer questions based on personal data and information. The chatbot will be able to provide insights, answer queries and assist with various tasks related to the user's personal information. The goal is to create a useful tool that can present personal information and improve interaction inside a personal website or locally without internet connection. It is still in development and will be released soon.
projectPages.technologies: JavaScript, API integration, HTML, CSS, Python
projectPages.learned: Coming soon. This project is still under development.
